description_long: This object is a modern pump-action shotgun with a sleek, matte black finish. It features a full stock and a single, cylindrical barrel with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, and the receiver is compact, connecting the barrel to the stock. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for tactical or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a full stock, single barrel, and ribbed fore-end. The design is robust and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, stock, barrel, ribbed fore-end, and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the magazine tube beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the features of the first side with clear visibility of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
